title: Stories Best Left Untold
description:
Stories Best Left Untold is an anthology of 10 chilling visual novel horror stories, each with its own characters, mysteries, and nightmares. From abandoned houses and forgotten apartments to roads that lead nowhere, every story reveals a new terror waiting in the dark.

Story 1: You Fit - The house was always available. There was a reason for that.

Story 2: Come Down - A letter from her dead grandmother leads Maren to Blackmoor, where something is waiting.

Story 3: The Night They Were Alone - Two siblings. One house. Something inside with them.

Story 4: The Key From Below - A coworker disappears. A key marked B1F is left behind.

Story 5: The Unit 3 Incident - The turbines never stopped running. Neither did whatever was beneath them.

Story 6: The Rules of Block C - Minh rents a cheap apartment. The landlord puts him on a night shift he didn't agree to.

Story 7: The Passenger System - Nick and Jonas are alone on a dark highway. The car slows for something in the road.

Story 8: The Night Bus - Riv misses the last bus home and boards a route that doesn't exist.

Story 9: The House That Keeps - Alex agrees to house-sit a strange house with rules he's expected to follow.

Story 10: The Night Ferry - The ferry arrives without a sound. By the time Eris realizes something is wrong, the shore is already gone.

The game features roughly 200 images and 25K words in total
description_short: Stories Best Left Untold is an anthology of 10 chilling visual novel horror stories, each with its own characters, mysteries, and nightmares. From abandoned houses and forgotten apartments to roads that lead nowhere, every story reveals a new terror waiting in the dark.
